experiments.description: Original skill — partial modules, custom error types (QrLoginError/WeChatError instead of NuClawError), missing QR login in 2/5 modules, media handling only in 1/5 modules.
Added anti-patterns for custom errors + complete modules — WORSE. Agent generated WeChat Web API instead of ilink, used BaseRequest+access_token, introduced syntax errors.
Consolidated complete wechat/mod.rs — correct ilink protocol (Bearer auth, ilinkai.weixin.qq.com), NuClawError variants for all errors, QR login, media with AES-128-ECB, security, 20 passing tests.
